human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether to resume the auto-advance pipeline or restart manually with /gsd-plan-phase 58 (which will detect existing plans and offer 'Add more plans / View existing / Replan from scratch')
human_actions_pending.context: User paused mid-pipeline. The 6 PLAN.md files are written but not yet checker-verified or committed.

decisions.decision: phaseId-only canonical service signatures with seasonId-overload bridge via SeasonPhaseService.findRegularPhase
decisions.rationale: Phase 58 stays scoped to service-layer; controllers/UI cutover stays in Phase 60. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-01..D-03.

decisions.decision: Combined-View Standings = flat list with raw points; TeamStanding gains nullable group field; Buchholz per-group only
decisions.rationale: Pragmatic — combined-view is anzeige-comfort, not championship math. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-04..D-06.

decisions.decision: Driver-ranking saisonweite Aggregation includes ALL phase types (REGULAR + PLAYOFF + PLACEMENT) — behavior change vs today
decisions.rationale: User chose all-phases over REGULAR-only. Today's findByRaceMatchdaySeasonId only catches REGULAR; new model widens to playoff race results too. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-07.

decisions.decision: DriverRankingService API: calculateRankingForPhase(phaseId) primary + aggregateAcrossPhases default-method + @Deprecated calculateRanking(seasonId) bridge
decisions.rationale: Narrow service; aggregation is a named explicit method, not magic inside calculateRanking. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-09.

decisions.decision: PhaseTestFixtures helper class (lokal in src/test/) + Mockito-only service tests + @DataJpaTest per new Repository
decisions.rationale: TestDataService rebuild is Phase 59; Phase 58 needs phase-aware fixtures without touching it. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-11..D-13. Note: research flagged @DataJpaTest has zero precedent in codebase — planner kept D-13 with explanatory comment.

decisions.decision: Strict Season-delete guard via BusinessRuleException — behavior change vs today
decisions.rationale: Phase hierarchy makes accidental cascade-deletes much higher impact. Today's delete has no pre-check. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-18.

decisions.decision: playoffService.createPlayoff auto-creates PLAYOFF phase via SeasonPhaseService.create when absent
decisions.rationale: Removes need for extra UI step in Phase 60. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-19.

decisions.decision: PlayoffSeedingService.autoSeedBracket draws Top-N from REGULAR-phase combined-view
decisions.rationale: Matches today's UX; PLAYOFF roster populated as side-effect of seed. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-15.

decisions.decision: SiteGenerator brought along in Phase 58 (phase-aware caller-side updates)
decisions.rationale: Static-site stays correct after Phase 58 without waiting for Phase 60. See 58-CONTEXT.md D-23.
Adjusted from initial proposal: Swiss depends on Standings (Pitfall 6); Playoff depends on Standings (D-15). Foundation 58-01 first; caller-side 58-06 last. See 58-RESEARCH.md plan decomposition.

uncommitted_files: .planning/ROADMAP.md (annotated by planner with 6-plan list — replaced 'Plans: TBD')
next_action: Run `/gsd-resume-work` OR `/gsd-plan-phase 58` to re-enter the pipeline at the plan-checker step. Plans exist on disk so the workflow will offer 'Add more plans / View existing / Replan from scratch' — choose 'View existing' to inspect, then optionally re-run with --skip-verify=false to trigger the checker.
context_notes: User invoked /gsd-pause-work after the gsd-planner returned PLANNING COMPLETE but before the plan-checker ran. Auto-advance pipeline (--chain → discuss → plan → execute) was active and was mid-step. The chain was: discuss-phase 58 --chain (done) → plan-phase 58 --auto (planner finished, 6 PLAN.md files written, but plan-check + STATE update + execute have not run). Phase 58 is a backend service-layer refactor — 6 services to refactor + 1 new SeasonPhaseService + 3 new repository IT-tests. Two behavior changes documented (D-07 driver-ranking widens; D-18 strict delete-guard) — these need explicit verification when execution begins.
